Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Club Escapade... The door is[n]locked because it's not open yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if Mutatsu is doing well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a lot of time here with Mutatsu.[n]I feel like we formed a strong bond...[n]{f 1 1}
